name: Scalloped Oysters#2
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups medium-coarse saltine cracker crumbs (46 crackers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oysters, reserving 1/4 cup liquor.
2. In a small bowl, melt butter at High for 1 minute.
3. Stir in cracker crumbs.
4. Spread 1/3 of the cracker crumbs in an 8 x 1 1/2-inch round baking dish.
5. Cover with half the oysters and sprinkle with pepper.
6. Using another 1/3 of the cracker crumbs, spread a second layer over the oysters; cover with the remaining oysters.
7. Sprinkle with additional pepper.
8. Combine cream, reserved oyster liquor, salt, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl.
9. Pour the mixture over the oysters.
10. Cook, covered at Medium High for 6 to 8 minutes.
11. Top with remaining cracker crumbs before serving.
Makes 4 servings.
Total cooking time: 7 minutes.
